releases.author: tiancaijb
releases.description: Fix settings not rendering after urge timer duration due to double-nested L.settings reference.

releases.author: tiancaijb
releases.description:
Fix review compliance:
- Add LICENSE
- Replace direct style assignments with CSS classes / setCssProps
- Replace innerHTML with sanitizeHTMLToDom
- Use activeDocument and window.setTimeout for popout compatibility

releases.author: tiancaijb
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Urge timer with countdown and victory/relapse logging
- Daily check-in reminder with missed-reminder catch-up
- Dashboard with streak, success rate, weekly/monthly stats
- Bilingual: English / 中文
- Settings: timer duration, reminder time, tolerance window
releases.name: v1.0.0
